title: Exponentiation by squaring = b^e (correctness twin of the cost unit)
statement_informal: Exponentiation by squaring computes b^e with ~lg e multiplications: fastpow b e = (b^(e/2))^2 * b^(e mod 2). This is the correctness twin of fast-exponentiation-mults (which counts the multiplications). Theorem: fastpow fuel b e = b^e for e <= fuel.

cost_model.notes: Square the half-power, multiply in b^(e mod 2); ~lg e mults. Correctness via b^(q+q+r) = b^e where e = 2q+r (Nat.div_mod_eq, Nat.pow_add_r).

references: Right-to-left / square-and-multiply exponentiation (TAOCP Vol. 2 §4.6.3). Correctness twin of work-units/fast-exponentiation-mults.
